message:
fix(deploy): restore db build step for phage.db.gz generation

The .gz file is built during Vercel deploy, not committed to git.
Reverts unnecessary .vercelignore changes that excluded the source db.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,9 +18,9 @@ dist/
 packages/wasm-compute/target/
 packages/tui/
 
-# Database files (only .gz needed for deployment, raw db built locally)
-*.db
-!packages/web/public/phage.db.gz
+# Database files (exclude root, but keep packages/web/public/phage.db for deployment)
+/phage.db
+!packages/web/public/phage.db
 
 # Documentation (not needed for deploy)
 *.md
@@ -49,6 +49,9 @@ repro_*.ts
 test-*.ts
 phage_illustrations/
 
+# Local logs
+*.log
+
 # IDE/local
 .env.local
 .env*.local

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "$schema": "https://openapi.vercel.sh/vercel.json",
-  "buildCommand": "cd packages/web && bun run build",
+  "buildCommand": "cd packages/web && bun run ../../scripts/build-web-db.ts --source public/phage.db --output public && bun run build",
   "outputDirectory": "packages/web/dist",
   "installCommand": "bun install",
   "framework": null,
